title: Discovery Starter-Kit Registry
description: Auto-generated aggregate of every starter-kits/<name>/kit.json in the repository, produced by .github/scripts/update_starter_kits_registry.py and written to .auto-registry/starter-kit-registry.json. Each entry in 'kits' is the full kit.json manifest (which must independently validate against docs/schemas/starter-kit-schema.json before merge) augmented with four computed fields and per-ref agent metadata. This schema validates the wrapper plus the augmentation fields; the upstream per-kit schema enforces kit.json correctness.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version of this registry file.

generatedAt.description: UTC timestamp of when this registry was generated.

commitSha.description: Git commit SHA of the repository state used to generate this registry.

kits.description: One entry per starter-kits/<name>/kit.json in the repository.

RegistryKitEntry.description: A single starter-kit registry entry. Contains every field from the source kit.json (validated upstream by docs/schemas/starter-kit-schema.json) plus the augmentation fields below. additionalProperties is true so that kit.json fields pass through without duplicating the per-kit schema here.

name.description: Kebab-case identifier; equals the parent directory name.

agentRefs.description: Top-level agentRefs from kit.json, with each entry optionally enriched with an agentMeta object describing the referenced agent.

availability.description: Computed: 'degraded' when any required agentRef is absent from the agent registry for an active kit; otherwise 'healthy'. Archived kits always report 'healthy'.

missingAgents.description: Computed: list of agentRef strings (both required and optional) not found in the agent registry at registry-generation time.

computedAt.description: Computed: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp this entry was generated. Equal to the top-level generatedAt.

kitPath.description: Computed: repo-relative path to the source kit directory.

EnrichedAgentRef.description: An agentRef from kit.json, optionally enriched with metadata about the referenced agent. The base shape (ref, role, required, description) mirrors docs/schemas/starter-kit-schema.json#/definitions/agentRef.

ref.description: Path to the referenced agent directory, e.g. agents/my-agent.

agentMeta.description: Computed: snapshot of the referenced agent's identity at registry-generation time. Present only when the referenced agent exists in the agent registry AND has a parseable metadata.yaml. Absent when the agent is missing or unparseable.
